corrections.current: ἐσφραγισαν] εν τω δακτ. | om εν A
corrections.correct: ἐσφραγισαν] εν τω δακτ. Q | om εν A
corrections.note: The siglum Q is present after 'εν τω δακτ.' in the printed apparatus and was omitted in the transcription.

notes: Body text and running head match the scan. Apparatus largely correct; only clear issue is omitted siglum Q in the note for 14. Page number 589 at foot is not part of the transcription.
